ops.body: Done. All 27 findings resolved (25 filed + 2 masked by golangci's max-same-issues=3 default: transfer.go:141 res.Body.Close, attachment.go:52 f.Close). Real fixes: errorlint x2 (errors.Join tree walk + errors.As in objectErrors), errcheck write-path folds into named err returns, perm tightening 0755->0750/0644->0600. By-design gosec sites annotated inline per codex security review (G204 at lfs/auth.go: ssh args derive solely from locally-configured remote URL, -- hardening, digits-only port -> nosec verdict; G304 x3: CLI-by-design paths), mirroring noteslink.go precedent; .golangci.yml byte-identical to before (codex config review flagged the draft file-scoped exclusion's unanchored regex -> replaced with per-site annotations). Landed as fdc4ca40 + 3d068ec7 on main; CI run 28746016260 fully green including lint. Verified locally with --max-same-issues=0: zero issues.
